pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK version.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version that supports Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not support compiling against Java 21 targets or may lack necessary bug fixes for newer JDKs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace separate source and target configuration with the unified release configuration in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the modern standard for cross-compilation and ensures consistent toolchain usage, replacing the deprecated separate source/target approach.

sampler/src/main/java/atlantafx/sampler/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for URI conversion.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for theme selection.
Replace String.format() with String.formatted() for logging message formatting.
Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15 for cleaner string interpolation.
Replace String.format with String.formatted for string interpolation.
